raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a charge of {$350.00} appeared on my AMEX card from XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX via XXXX Guest Checkout. I never received any product or confirmation. When I contacted the merchant, they claimed I never placed an order. 

Because the transaction was processed through XXXX Guest Checkout, I am unable to file a dispute directly with XXXX it does not appear in my XXXX account, and I am now locked out entirely. 

I initiated a dispute with AMEX, but was told the process could take up to 90 days. I am filing this complaint to ensure AMEX fulfills its obligation under the Fair Credit Billing Act to protect cardholders from fraudulent and unfulfilled transactions. I request a full chargeback for the amount.
